== Notes for [[Item:Q103414|Q103414]] ==

Mayorazgo y Alcalde de la Santa Hermandad de Almargo

Fuente: http://www.bisabuelos.com
--------------------
bisabuelos.com gives a birth year for Alonso as c. 1495

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000020842034974

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
